analysis_checklist: Image type (main-image / lifestyle / infographic / size-chart / packaging / emotional)
Layout description (product position, text position, background)
Text content if any (headlines, bullets, badges)

features_template: Premium shatterproof acrylic — safe and durable for years
Vibrant double-sided UV print that won't fade or peel
Pre-drilled hole with included ribbon — ready to hang instantly
Lightweight design perfect for any tree or display stand
Keepsake-quality gift with personalized touch
acrylic_ornament.default_color_preference: vibrant jewel tones, rich colors with light transparency

features_template: Natural solid wood construction — warm and authentic feel
Precision laser-cut with smooth sanded edges
Vibrant UV print design that lasts for years
Includes twine or ribbon for easy hanging
Eco-friendly keepsake gift with rustic charm
wood_ornament.default_color_preference: warm earth tones, natural wood browns, soft gold

features_template: Premium thick cardstock with a smooth matte finish
Vibrant full-color print — sharp details front and back
Perfectly sized to fit standard envelopes
Blank interior for your personal heartfelt message
Arrives flat and crisp — ready to give or mail
paper_card.default_color_preference: clean whites, soft pastels, elegant gold accents

features_template: Airtight seal keeps contents fresh and secure
Clear glass or premium material shows off beautiful design
Generous capacity — perfect for small gifts or storage
Reusable decorative jar for home or office
Gift-ready packaging — no extra wrapping needed
jar.default_color_preference: warm neutrals, cheerful accent colors, cozy tones

features_template: Premium wood or acrylic frame built to last
Easel back for tabletop display — no wall mounting needed
Personalized design printed in vivid, fade-resistant color
Fits standard photo sizes for easy customization
Meaningful keepsake gift for any occasion
frame.default_color_preference: classic wood tones, warm white, subtle gold

features_template: Premium materials — built with care and attention to detail
Vibrant UV print design that won't fade or peel
Multi-functional — doubles as decor and gift
Compact and lightweight — easy to package and give
Unique handcrafted design you won't find anywhere else
mixed.default_color_preference: harmonious warm palette with accent colors
